title: Summary: Turn 16
content: The Pueblo project is a CLI code agent built with TypeScript/Node.js, featuring desktop integration, GitHub Copilot and DeepSeek support, session lifecycle management, utility tools (grep, glob, exec), and SQLite persistence. Configuration is read from `.pueblo/config.json` with defaults applied if missing; the project is built to `dist/` and launched via `node dist/cli/index.js`.
